body.u: Looking back on the years of my life which started at the age of 15 1978. I can remember it was a nice year with the summer flowers just blooming. In the months to camecome I was searching for a job which could satisfiesatisfy me this took some time and by then I had made many friends. After many cold winters and job going well, I got married to a person who I would call ideal.

Then after being married for several years money was coming in well but the years before had been bad with many people being made redundant, my husband being one of those life became more exciting and my husband and I had twins they were grand chaps James and mark was their names. We had to buy a better place to live in as the place we were living in was only two rooms. After looking around for some time we moved into this place a grand old place was it then and quietquite modern. It was good in those days with all the countryside around yah and the people that did live near where good friends of yours to, but life went on and with the house and children to look after I couldn’t go out to work.

Years went by and the twins grow up and I got old and by this time I couldn’t have any more children. My husband who was a keen musician left his disco acwipmentequipment to areour son James who took after his father who by this time had retired and my husband and I decided that we would go on a short holiday to get away from the house, a short while after me son Mark got married and his with Kathy was expecting a child. Whilst my other son James was not even thinking of getting married, my husband and I only talked about the past and how grand it has been.
